title: juncus tenuis
intro: Juncus tenuis, also known as woodrush or jointed rush, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory problems, and relieving digestive issues. Juncus tenuis can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
